title: Double-Tier Macrame Plant Hanger
excerpt: Display two plants in one beautiful macrame hanger with this tiered design.

steps.title: Plan spacing
steps.description: Decide the distance between tiers - typically 30-40cm apart works well.

steps.title: Create top tier
steps.description: Start with a standard plant hanger pattern attached to the top ring.

steps.title: Add second tier
steps.description: Continue the cords down and create another basket section for the lower pot.

steps.title: Finish bottom
steps.description: Gather all cords and create a decorative tassel at the very bottom.

tips: Use smaller pots on top, larger on bottom for visual balance
Ensure mounting hardware can support the weight of both plants when watered

videoTutorials.title: DIY Hanging Macramé SHELF Plant Hanger Tutorial
